author: doll-agent
content: Add Poly::linspace(n, domain) as a default trait method. Builds n evenly-spaced xs from lo..=hi using the polynomial's domain (or the supplied override), then calls eval_many. All six basis types pick this up automatically. Tests cover normal usage, n<2 error, and explicit-domain override. Equivalent to numpy.polynomial.<basis>.<basis>.linspace.
